nodes.title: The Rise of the LLMs - How I Learned to Stop Worrying & Love the GPT!

nodes.full_text:
Downloaded 99 times

The presentation discusses the rapid rise of large language models (LLMs) like GPT, highlighting their viral user growth and potential as a transformative technology in human-machine interaction. It emphasizes the importance of data access and privacy for businesses leveraging AI, while forecasting future advancements like multi-modal models and artificial general intelligence. The document suggests embracing uncertainty and innovation in AI to create new opportunities.
